phase: CFS V1 Layout Stabilization and Executive UI Repair
top_nav_fixes: Converted TopNav to a fixed 64px single-row layout.
Removed flex wrapping that allowed status chips to spill into the workspace.
Kept the CFS identity, product mode switch, command search, scene status, API status, and More control as the primary visible nav elements.
Moved role, workspace, scenario, and secondary status details into a compact absolute More popover.
Kept product modes compact with icon-first labels that expand on wider viewports.

floating_chip_fix.change: Removed selected parcel status from TopNav.
floating_chip_fix.reason: Selected parcel state is already visible in the map Active Selection card and right Intelligence Panel, where it does not float or wrap into the map area.

right_panel_fixes: Changed the right rail title to the stable short label Intelligence.
Removed awkward title truncation from the main right panel header.
Reduced panel padding and shortened overview and due-diligence helper copy.
Kept API/static state as a subtle one-line badge.
left_panel_cleanup: Renamed the left rail from Explore / Layers / Site Sourcing to Explore / Map Layers.
Shortened the search card to Find parcels.
Renamed the layer registry heading to Active Overlays.
Replaced the long Development, constraints, and context heading with compact layer language.
Reduced left rail card padding and collapsed explanatory copy.
map_viewport_improvements: Reduced overview left rail width from 340px max to 304px.
Reduced overview intelligence rail width from 380px max to 356px.
Reduced due-diligence intelligence rail width from 460px max to 412px.
Adjusted AppShell grid padding and top divider to align with the new 64px nav.
Desktop smoke test at 1440px showed a 732px map width with 304px left rail and 356px right rail.
visual_noise_reduction: Removed the top-nav selected parcel chip.
Reduced repeated API wording in the right panel header.
Shortened left rail descriptions and layer section titles.
Kept legends inside layer controls instead of adding another visible legend surface.

smoke_test.note: Use http://localhost:3000 for local Next dev. 127.0.0.1 can trigger Next dev-origin protection unless configured in allowedDevOrigins.

remaining_ui_polish_items: Layer detail cards are still feature-rich when expanded; future polish could add nested compact/advanced toggles per layer.
Parcel filter controls remain dense in Overview when API data is loaded; future polish could collapse advanced filters by default.
A screenshot-based visual QA pass would help tune exact rail balance after stakeholder review.
